issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Encode/decode a JS object containing Date fields losslessly over a WebSocket using @msgpack/msgpack
scenarios.rationale: Baseline calls encode/decode but loses Date type or converts to ISO strings, while treatment registers an ExtensionCodec with a Date encode/decode pair and sets ws.binaryType = 'arraybuffer' as documented.

scenarios.name: Stream-decode a large MessagePack payload from a Node.js Readable stream
scenarios.rationale: Baseline buffers the whole stream and calls decode once, while treatment uses decodeMultiStream(readableStream) inside a for-await loop to process items incrementally as documented.
